song.title: Give Us Clean Hands
song.author: Charlie Hall
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G We bow our hearts .D We bend our knees .C G D/F# O, Spirit come, we are humbled .G D We turn our eyes from empty things .C O Lord, we cast down our idols.
[P] . G Give us clean hands . D Give us pure hearts . Em D C We will not lift our souls to another (2X)
[C] . G D O God let us be a generation who seeks . Em D C Who seeks Your heart O God our Father (2X)
